input_changes.note: Aviation information analysis workflow diagram — new input not in v1 manifest. File could not be visually inspected due to filename encoding issue, but described as workflow diagram by user.

code_changes.description: Leaflet CSS changed from CDN link in layout.tsx to import in LeafletMapInner.tsx
Leaflet marker icon fix with L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions() for webpack compatibility
Map wrapper div added position:relative for proper sizing in Grid layout
Map legend added showing Critical/High/Other NOTAM colors + route line
NOTAM circle popup on dashboard map — click circle shows NOTAM details + link to detail page
NOTAM circle popup on flight detail map — same popup pattern as dashboard
Route dropdown '전체' (All) option added as default in dashboard route selector
Dashboard criticalNotams API changed from critical-only to critical+high filter
Map NOTAM source changed from criticalNotams prop to extracting all NOTAMs from routeImpacts.notams
Route status info popover on RouteTable '상태' column header explaining active/suspended/alternate
Flight status info popover on FlightTable '상태' column header explaining status values
Dashboard map info popover on '항로 NOTAM 영향 지도' header explaining map elements
NOTAM importance colors on flight map — per-importance colors instead of all-red

feedback_items.description: Aviation information analysis workflow diagram added — may contain new workflow requirements or process clarifications not captured in v1
feedback_items.note: Image file could not be visually inspected; content analysis deferred to requirements-analyst stage

feedback_items.description: Leaflet map rendering fixes (CSS import, marker icons, wrapper sizing) — CC-001, CC-002, CC-003
Map interactivity improvements — legend, popups, route dropdown, importance colors — CC-004, CC-005, CC-006, CC-007, CC-012, CC-013
Dashboard data filtering changed — critical+high instead of critical-only for NOTAMs, map uses all route NOTAMs instead of critical-only — CC-008, CC-009
Status column info popovers added to RouteTable and FlightTable — CC-010, CC-011

modified.reason: FB-004: Dashboard 'critical NOTAMs' widget now includes high-importance NOTAMs, not just critical. Acceptance criteria 'Default view shows only critical and high importance NOTAMs' wording aligns but implementation detail changed.
FB-003, FB-004: Map now shows all route-relevant NOTAMs (not just critical), has legend, popups, route '전체' option, and info popover. Multiple new acceptance criteria needed.

potentially_added.note: 항공정보분석workflow.png may introduce new requirements pending visual inspection at requirements-analyst stage

modified.reason: CC-003/004/005/007/009/012: Added legend component, popup on circle click, '전체' route option, info popover, changed data source from criticalNotams to routeImpacts.notams
CC-006/013: Added popup on circle click, per-importance color coding
CC-001/002: Leaflet CSS import moved here, marker icon fix added
CC-010: Added Popover on status column header
CC-011: Added Popover on status column header
6 components modified with new sub-components, props, and behavior
CC-008: API filter changed to include high-importance NOTAMs
CC-001/002: CSS import + marker icon fix
CC-001: Removed CDN link for leaflet CSS
CC-003/004/005/007/009/012: Major rework — legend, popups, route selector, data source, info popover, wrapper div

unchanged_files.note: 107 of 115 pipeline-generated files are unchanged (8 modified by direct code changes)

reentry_reason: New input file (항공정보분석workflow.png) may contain workflow requirements not captured in v1. Additionally, FR-005 and FR-006 acceptance criteria need updating to reflect the 13 direct code changes. The workflow diagram must be analyzed before architecture or specs can be updated. Direct code changes (CC-001 through CC-013) are already applied to the codebase and should be reconciled into the artifact chain (requirements -> architecture -> specs) to maintain traceability.

requirements-analyst.action: Analyze 항공정보분석workflow.png for new/modified requirements. Update FR-005/FR-006 acceptance criteria to match direct code changes. Check if workflow diagram introduces new FRs.
requirements-analyst.scope: incremental — update existing FRs, add new if workflow diagram requires

architect.action: Update architecture.json component definitions to reflect Popover additions, data source changes, and new sub-components (MapLegend, MapPopup patterns). Add cloudscape_components entries.

spec-writer.action: Update frontend-spec.json for 6 modified components. Update backend-spec.json for dashboard API filter change.

code-generator.action: Skip regeneration for the 8 already-modified files. Only regenerate if requirements-analyst or architect identifies new requirements from workflow diagram.
code-generator.scope: minimal — direct code changes already applied

estimated_changes.note: Code changes are already in place. Primary work is reconciling artifacts (requirements/architecture/specs) to match the current code state, plus analyzing the new workflow diagram.
